data.name: Lite Research
data.description: Returns answers quickly. Good for straightforward questions that just need a fast, reliable answer.

data.name: Standard Research
data.description: The default. Balances speed and depth, a good fit for most questions.

data.name: Deep Research
data.description: Spends more time researching and cross-referencing sources. Use this when accuracy and thoroughness matter more than speed.

data.name: Exhaustive Research
data.description: The most thorough option. Explores the topic as fully as possible, best suited for complex research tasks where you want the highest quality result.
